Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are being asked we have a long description of a property onboarding process for a property management company The prompt is we have just heard the explanation we want to ask a series of clarifying questions to deepen our understanding

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The questions should aim to uncover missing details understand decision criteria clarify roles and responsibilities verify timing and sequencing and learn about how exceptions are handled

Name: Validation - PE
Text: They want a list of targeted open ended questions not queries for SQL or implementation The final answer should be a list of targeted open ended questions that we would ask the interviewee

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So we need to produce a set of open ended questions that cover missing details for example what about landlords documentation What specific documents are required Are there any thresholds for compliance How is the verification done Are there checklists How do they decide if a document is outdated

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: decision criteria for property manager assignment what metrics How is workload measured What if no manager is available What is the process for assigning

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: intro meeting who organizes Who sets agenda How long What happens if landlord cannot attend

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: scheduling photographer and inspector who coordinates How far in advance How are they vetted What are the timelines How do we handle if inspector finds issues Are there standard timelines for remediation How many times can they re inspect Who pays for repairs Are there budgets What happens if landlord refuses to fix

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Marketing Who decides pricing How is market analysis done How do they incorporate trends How many platforms Who writes listing copy Who approves Is there a brand standard

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Activation what triggers activation Is there a checklist Who enters data How is data quality ensured

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Tenant screening Who does the screening Is there a standard set of criteria How do they handle multiple applicants How do they decide Are there policies for non discrimination How do they handle potential conflicts of interest How is the lease drafted Who reviews it Is there a standard lease template What about custom clauses

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Move in Who handles keys How is deposit held How is move in inspection done Who does final walkthrough How are exceptions handled for example late move in

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Quality checks Who does compliance How are the checks documented How often Are there audits Who reviews financial analysis What are the criteria What about IT integration How is data migrated Who does testing

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Exception handling for example special insurance custom lease clauses How are these flagged Who approves What is the escalation path Are there SLAs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Roles responsibilities Who are the stakeholders What are the hand offs How is communication tracked Are there assigned owners for each step Is there a project manager

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Timing What are typical durations for each stage Are there deadlines Are there dependencies Is there a process for accelerating Are there fallback procedures if delays

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Overall process Is there a documented workflow Is it BPMN or something Is there a central system How is the process monitored Are there KPIs What reporting exists

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Data What data is captured How is it stored Are there any data quality issues How is privacy handled

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Misc Are there any legal regulatory considerations How do they ensure fair housing compliance How do they handle evictions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to ask open ended questions that ask about these details The phrasing should be open not yes no

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Possible list Can you walk me through the specific documents the property coordinator reviews during the initial verification stage and how they determine if a document is current or if it needs updating

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What criteria do you use to assign a property manager to a new property and how do you weigh factors such as workload geographic coverage property type experience and landlord preferences

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Could you describe the content and format of the introductory meeting between the property manager and the landlord Who sets the agenda and how is follow up documented

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How do you schedule the photographer and inspector and what is the typical lead time How do you ensure they are qualified and independent

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: If the inspector identifies issues what is the process for remediation Who decides whether the property can proceed to marketing and what happens if the landlord disagrees or delays repairs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How is the rental price determined and who is involved in setting the price What data sources and methodologies are used for market analysis

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What is the workflow for creating the online listing and marketing materials Who approves the final listing before activation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Once the property is activated what steps are taken to manage tenant applications How do you handle multiple applicants and what criteria guide the selection decision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Can you describe the lease finalization process Who drafts the lease how are custom clauses handled and who reviews for compliance before signing

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: After lease execution what are the quality check and audit procedures Who performs the compliance financial and IT checks and what happens if issues are discovered

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How does the company handle exceptions such as properties requiring special insurance custom lease clauses or unusual landlord requirements What is the escalation path for these cases

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What tools or systems are used to track the progress of each onboarding step and how is communication among stakeholders landlords managers support teams documented

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Are there defined timelines or Service Level Agreements for each stage of the onboarding process How are delays monitored and addressed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What KPIs or performance metrics are tracked for the onboarding process and how are they used to improve efficiency

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How do you ensure fair housing compliance and legal regulatory adherence throughout tenant screening and lease execution

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: What training or certification do property managers and coordinators have regarding the onboarding workflow and how is the process updated or improved over time

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We can also ask about variation across property types or cities Roles and responsibilities who is accountable for each step Handoffs between internal and external stakeholders Data capture what data is recorded quality control How do you handle disputes or disagreements with landlords or tenants What are the most common bottlenecks or pain points observed in the process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user wants targeted open ended questions not generic
